test-method.name: tc_009
test-method.description: Verify H2o login page will display all fields

test-method.name: tc_001
test-method.description: Verify H2o Signup page will display all fields

test-method.name: tc_002
test-method.description: Verify alert with blank data on Signup page

test-method.name: tc_003
test-method.description: Verify name field alert with invalid data on Signup page

test-method.name: tc_004
test-method.description: Verify Password field alert with invalid data on Signup page

test-method.name: tc_005
test-method.description: Verify Email field alert with invalid data on Signup page

test-method.name: tc_006
test-method.description: Verify admin user will able to Signup successfully

exception.message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"link text","selector":"Sign Up"} (Session info: MicrosoftEdge=149.0.4022.62) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '23.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.edge.EdgeDriver Command: [37d6dc4cc5499f7b09975b7e5d87ff8b, findElement {value=Sign Up, using=link text}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: MicrosoftEdge, browserVersion: 149.0.4022.62, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:processID: 17096, ms:edgeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:62202}, msedge: {msedgedriverVersion: 149.0.4022.62 (068a180137b0..., userDataDir: C:\Users\nalla\AppData\Loca...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:62202/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 149.0.4022.62, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 37d6dc4cc5499f7b09975b7e5d87ff8b

test-method.name: tc_007
test-method.description: Verify Normal user will able to Signup successfully

test-method.name: tc_008
test-method.description: Verify alert message when sign up with existing user details
